admin_fields_leaked_to_user.description: API returns admin-only fields (is_admin, role, internal_id, audit_log, deleted_at) to non-admin sessions -- response over-fetches DB row instead of projecting allowed fields

probes.description: Inspect user-context response for admin-only field names -- if present in body for non-admin role, server returns full row without column whitelist

pii_overfetch_in_listing.description: List endpoint returns full user objects (email, phone, address, DOB, SSN-tail) when UI only shows name+avatar -- backend serializes full model

probes.description: Listing response contains PII fields that the UI never renders -- token-economy violation + GDPR/CCPA exposure

internal_field_in_public_response.description: Response leaks server-side internal fields (debug, env, db_host, region, internal_user_id, _id mongo, __v) that should never reach the client

probes.description: Mongo `__v`/`_id`, internal env hints, or db_host field present -- ORM serialization without toJSON filter

field_filter_bypass_via_fields_param.description: API supports `?fields=` projection -- attacker requests fields the UI omits (password_hash, mfa_secret, recovery_codes)

probes.description: Request sensitive fields explicitly -- if any returned, server has no field-level authorization

graphql_introspection_full_schema.description: GraphQL introspection exposes admin-only mutations, internal types, deprecated-but-live fields

probes.description: Introspection returns full schema -- mine for `AdminMutation`, `Internal*`, `*Debug`, deleted fields

response_overshare_after_filter_mismatch.description: Endpoint filters list by tenant in WHERE clause but serializer returns full org tree -- filter applies only to ID list, related entities serialized in full

probes.description: Inspect related/nested objects in list response -- cross-tenant data may appear inside nested `organization` / `parent` / `owner` blobs
